description: Stage-3a exit-code transitions for inline-suppression and baseline. noBaseline: exit code when NO baseline is applied and findings are present. fullBaseline: exit code when ALL findings are baselined (0 new findings). partialBaseline: exit code when only SOME findings are baselined (≥1 new finding). ws-d8 findings are 'high' severity (not critical): fail-on=critical → CLEAN always; fail-on=high → 1 (noBaseline/partial) or 0 (fullBaseline) — the 1→0 transition.
